---
title: "Day 2 · Exercise"
subtitle: "Data wrangling with the tidyverse"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

# 1. Load and combine

Load an ISTAC hotel **occupancy** file and an ISTAC hotel **capacity**
file for the Canary Islands (monthly, 2024). Join them on island,
year, and month.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 2. Engineer features

Compute a monthly **occupancy rate** per island as
`nights / available_beds`.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 3. Summarise

For each island, report the mean, median and standard deviation of the
monthly occupancy rate in 2024, sorted by mean occupancy.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 4. Comment

Write 4–6 lines summarising what the table shows: which islands are
the most and least occupied, whether there is obvious seasonality, and
one plausible tourism explanation.
